heading: No postal equipment or supplies manufactured by convict labor
label: 2201 No postal equipment or supplies manufactured by convict labor
text: Except as provided in chapter 307 of title 18, the Postal Service may not make a contract for the purchase of equipment or supplies to be manufactured by convict labor.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , pursuant to Resolution No. 71–9 of the Board of Governors. See , set out as a note preceding .July 1, 1971section 15(a) of Pub. L. 91–375section 101 of this title
